intimate.description: Closest emotional element; usually lead vocal or exposed solo moment.
intimate.reverb: none, slap, or very short room

foreground.description: Clearly heard musical elements that support the emotional center.
foreground.eq: present but slightly less full than intimate

midground.description: Musical fabric; heard when focused on but not demanding attention.
midground.reverb: shared plate or chamber, moderate send
midground.eq: slight high-shelf down, controlled low-mid warmth

background.description: Texture, atmosphere, room tone, glue, emotional haze.
background.reverb: hall or long plate, high send
background.level: -12 dB or more from intimate layer
